issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing cost restriction (≤5) in filter. Official text requires 'cost of 5 or less' as a condition.
SearchDeck does not capture the 'look at 5 cards' mechanic. Action should specify depth:5 or similar parameter to limit deck inspection scope.
Missing action for placing remaining cards at bottom of deck. Official text requires: reveal up to 1 card AND place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL omits deck ordering instruction.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Sabo], [Portgas.D.Ace], or [Monkey.D.Luffy] with a cost of 5 or less and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
